# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Three-tier application VPC with public and private subnets, internet gateway, and NAT gateway for rapid deployment

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Description: Environment name used for resource tagging
    Type: String
    Default: three-tier-app
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z0-9-]*'
    ConstraintDescription: Must contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens

  VpcCidr:
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    AllowedPattern: '(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}'

  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 1 (Web Tier - AZ1)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24

  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2 (Web Tier - AZ2)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24

  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 1 (App Tier - AZ1)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24

  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 2 (App Tier - AZ2)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24

  PrivateSubnet3Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 3 (Database Tier - AZ1)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.20.0/24

  PrivateSubnet4Cidr:
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 4 (Database Tier - AZ2)
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.21.0/24

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-vpc
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-igw
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  InternetGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  # Elastic IP for NAT Gateway
  NatGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-nat-eip

  # NAT Gateway (in Public Subnet 1)
  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-nat-gw

  # Public Subnets (Web Tier)
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-public-web-az1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Web
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-public-web-az2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Web
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Private Subnets (App Tier)
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-private-app-az1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Application
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-private-app-az2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Application
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Private Subnets (Database Tier)
  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet3Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-private-db-az1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Database
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateSubnet4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet4Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-private-db-az2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Database
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-public-rt
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  # Private Route Table (App Tier)
  PrivateAppRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-private-app-rt
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Application
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  DefaultPrivateAppRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  # Private Route Table (Database Tier - no internet access)
  PrivateDbRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-private-db-rt
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Database
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateSubnet3RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet3

  PrivateSubnet4RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet4

  # Network ACL for Public Subnets (Web Tier)
  PublicNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-public-nacl
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Web

  PublicNetworkAclInboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  PublicNetworkAclInboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  PublicNetworkAclInboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PublicNetworkAclOutboundAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PublicSubnet1NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  PublicSubnet2NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  # Network ACL for Database Tier (restrict to VPC CIDR only)
  DatabaseNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-database-nacl
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Database

  DatabaseNetworkAclInboundFromVpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref DatabaseNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr

  DatabaseNetworkAclOutboundToVpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref DatabaseNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      Egress: true
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr

  PrivateSubnet3NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      NetworkAclId: !Ref DatabaseNetworkAcl

  PrivateSubnet4NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet4
      NetworkAclId: !Ref DatabaseNetworkAcl

  # DB Subnet Group for RDS
  DatabaseSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for database tier
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet4
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-db-subnet-group
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-VpcId

  VpcCidrBlock:
    Description: VPC CIDR Block
    Value: !Ref VpcCidr
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-VpcCidr

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID (Web Tier - AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnet1Id

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID (Web Tier - AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnet2Id

  PrivateAppSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 1 ID (App Tier - AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateAppSubnet1Id

  PrivateAppSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 2 ID (App Tier - AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateAppSubnet2Id

  PrivateDbSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 3 ID (Database Tier - AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet3
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateDbSubnet1Id

  PrivateDbSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 4 ID (Database Tier - AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet4
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateDbSubnet2Id

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of public subnet IDs
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PublicSubnetIds

  PrivateAppSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of private app subnet IDs
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateAppSubnetIds

  PrivateDbSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of private database subnet IDs
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet4
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateDbSubnetIds

  DatabaseSubnetGroupName:
    Description: Database subnet group name for RDS
    Value: !Ref DatabaseSubnetGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-DatabaseSubnetGroup

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: Internet Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-InternetGatewayId

  NatGatewayId:
    Description: NAT Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref NatGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-NatGatewayId

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PublicRouteTableId

  PrivateAppRouteTableId:
    Description: Private App Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateAppRouteTableId

  PrivateDbRouteTableId:
    Description: Private Database Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateDbRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${EnvironmentName}-PrivateDbRouteTableId
